title: SumUp Circuit Design System
content: Circuit from Directories: Components: Circuit UI is the web implementation of SumUp’s Circuit Design System, built to power consistent, accessible, and performant experiences across the company’s web applications. Rooted in a well-structured design token library, Circuit UI provides developers with reusable components, clear guidelines, and built-in accessibility best practices. Circuit UI is a practical toolkit for teams who want to move fast without compromising on quality or brand consistency. Elevation Repository Icons Spacing Storybook Tokens Alert banner Avatar Badges Button Cards Checkbox Chip Date picker Dialog Menus Modal Pagination Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Search Select Snackbar Switch Tabs Tag Text area Text field Tooltip
